word: G2021 - ἐπιχειρέω - epicheiréō - ep-ee-khi-reh'-o - Go about

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιχειρέω

- Transliteration: Epicheireo

- Phonetic: ep-ee-khi-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to put the hand to

2. to take in hand, undertake, attempt

- Origin: from G1909 and G5495

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G5495; to put the hand upon that is undertake: - go about take in hand (upon).
